title: GIT Ref Name Validation with Strict Length Limit

statement.markdown: Given a Git ref name, validate whether it meets the strict length limit of 72 characters. The name should be at least 1 character long and at most 72 characters. The validation should be case-insensitive, and it should not allow trailing dots or slashes. Your function should return `true` if the ref name is valid, and `false` otherwise.
statement.inputFormat: A string representing the Git ref name.
statement.outputFormat: A boolean indicating whether the ref name is valid.
statement.notes: Note that the input string can contain non-ASCII characters and special characters. The validation should be strict and reject any ref name that exceeds the 72-character limit.

examples.explanation: The ref name is within the 72-character limit.
The ref name exceeds the 72-character limit.
The ref name contains a trailing slash.
